name: Archon Railway Postgres Auth Template
description: Railway-ready Archon topology with a public Caddy form-auth proxy, private Archon app, private auth-service, Railway managed Postgres, and persistent Archon data.

source.notes: This metadata documents the intended Railway template shape. Configure each service to use the listed configPath in Railway's service settings or template builder.

requiredUserVariables: Any platform adapter tokens you enable, such as GITHUB_TOKEN and WEBHOOK_SECRET
manualSteps: Create a volume named archon-data on the archon-app service and mount it at /.archon.
Expose only archon-caddy with a Railway public domain or custom domain.
Keep archon-app and archon-auth without public domains.
Verify the app pre-deploy migration succeeds before exposing traffic.
